allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Add session persistence to OCC: mode using --resume

- OCC: mode now maintains conversation context across messages
- Uses Claude CLI --resume flag with session ID for context persistence
- First request creates session, subsequent requests use --resume
- Send "OCC: reset" to clear context and start a new session
- Add claude_session_reset_keyword config option \(default: "reset"\)
- Update documentation for session persistence feature

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
